summary: Nice soundboard recording of a solid show highlighted by an excellent Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World, though Jerry’s vocal mix is a bit thin and the Day‑Job encore falls short.
review: The sbd capture is clean and well‑balanced, delivering a clear picture of a generally tight performance. Reviewers praise the second set—especially the Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World sequence—but note that Jerry’s vocal level is low and the Day‑Job encore feels under‑whelming.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently good to great musical performance (70% weight) with a clean soundboard source (30% weight); reviewers give 4–5 stars and highlight few minor issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Boards are described as "nice" and clear; no major drop‑outs mentioned, though a slight vocal mix issue is noted.

standout_songs: Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World
show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall solid set with strong second‑set momentum; the show loses a bit of steam on the Day‑Job encore.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals are low/under‑mixed, but his playing remains solid.
